mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in rising rate periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending economic contraction, triggering risk-off flows that produce negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in greater than 60 percent of instances where UNRATE crosses the specified threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneously high retail sales growth and low consumer price inflation indicate robust consumer demand without monetary policy tightening pressure, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive returns when CPIAUCSL exceeds 3.0 percent annually despite strong RSAFS growth.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects immediate supply-side capacity utilization and corporate output expansion, generating positive short-term S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Five-day forward returns are negative in greater than 50 percent of periods following INDPRO acceleration.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained consumer price inflation above the 2.8 percent annualized threshold forces central bank tightening expectations, compressing equity multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive returns occur in greater than 55 percent of months where CPIAUCSL exceeds the threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent payroll employment growth and declining unemployment rates confirm broad-based labor market strength, boosting corporate revenue expectations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields negative forward returns in greater than 60 percent of observed months.

mechanism_narrative: Expanding real GDP and rising housing starts reflect sustained aggregate demand growth, supporting corporate earnings trajectories and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window or returns are negative in greater than 50 percent of quarters.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during a late-cycle expansion signals capacity constraints and slowing economic momentum, triggering equity market corrections and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in greater than 55 percent of periods when INDPRO declines during late-cycle phases.
